---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem

What can't you do today, or what's painful about how you do it now?

## What would you like

Describe the feature. Concrete examples (CLI invocations, API calls) are best.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about and reject?

## Phase fit

- [ ] Phase 1 (target: 2026-11-15 — CLI MVP scope only)
- [ ] Phase 2 (multi-engine, voice/embedding)
- [ ] Phase 3 (Studio v0, agent, judge fleet)
- [ ] Phase 4 (AWS Marketplace, image/video/3D)
- [ ] Phase 5 (Enterprise, robotics, chip)
- [ ] Unclear / propose new phase

## Anything else
